First, write the equation of the line segment passing through the two points. The slope is:

$$m = \frac{(17+2/3) - (12+2/3)}{(7 - 15)} = -\frac{5}{8}$$

The equation of the line is:

$$b = 1$$

$$y = -\frac{75}{8}x + 22$$

To find the integer points on the line segment, we need to find the values of x that make y an integer. Since x is between 7 and 15, the only integer value of x that makes y an integer is x = 8.
